name: context-budget-missing-on-medium-fails-context-check
description: A medium multi-file task whose state record omits `context_budget` for a phase. Per v2.4.0 AC3, `python scripts/quality_loop.py context-check <record>` must flag medium/mission phases with a missing `context_budget`, missing `output_summary`, or overlapping `inputs`/`excluded`. This case pins that a plain multi-file/behavior-change signal set still classifies as medium and requires the full medium gate set (validation contract, independent review, completion record) independent of the context-budget check, which is exercised directly against a record fixture by `context-check` rather than through `eval-cases`.

input.goal: Add per-tenant rate limiting to the billing webhook handler

gate_fixture_note: A v2.4.0 record for this task with a phase entry (e.g. plan) missing `context_budget` must fail `python scripts/quality_loop.py context-check <record>`.

record_fixture.goal: Add per-tenant rate limiting to billing webhook
